title: Dutch Chicken Casserole
description: A hearty, comforting casserole made with chicken, piquant dutch cheese, and a crispy crust.
instructions: In a large bowl, mix together flour, piquant dutch cheese, and dutch cheese.
Add the chicken to the bowl and toss to coat with the cheese mixture.
In a separate bowl, whisk together milk and melted butter.
Pour the milk mixture over the chicken and toss to coat.
Transfer the chicken mixture to a 9x13 inch baking dish.
Bake for 30-35 minutes, or until the chicken is cooked through and the top is golden brown.
Remove from oven and let cool for 5-10 minutes before serving.
